name: lotus-agents
description: Bundle the Lotus Agents `.local` + `.docs` workflow as a reusable Codex skill collection.

interface.longDescription: Bundle the Lotus Agents skill collection for adopting and operating a `.local` + `.docs` workflow across repositories.
defaultPrompt: Use Lotus Agents to initialize .local and .docs.
Prepare Lotus files for review or CI work, using remote context only when needed.
